brand_direction.positioning: CRM-first growth agency focused on measurable conversion + automation systems (not just creatives).

core_stack_bias.primary: GoHighLevel (Agency account + sub-accounts per client) for funnels, pipelines, automation, reporting, attribution.
core_stack_bias.supporting: Kommo for WhatsApp-centric sales pipelines + chatbot ops when needed; Zapier/Make for integrations; WordPress + Elementor for SEO authority site; WooCommerce when e-commerce is part of the offer.

tone.promise: systems that create revenue + retention, not one-off campaigns

primary_targets: high-ticket services (clinics/surgeons, premium real estate, luxury tourism/hospitality, C-level consultants)
aspirational lifestyle brands with repeat purchase potential
SMB owners who depend on WhatsApp speed-to-lead
brand_direction.offer_structure: Productized tiers (Good/Better/Best) with clear deliverables, SLAs, and onboarding checklist.

marketing_strategy_summary.north_star: Build a compounding owned database (CRM) while driving short-term bookings/sales.
core_loop: Traffic (ads + organic) → lead capture (GHL) → instant follow-up (WhatsApp/SMS/email) → pipeline (GHL) → appointment/checkout → post-sale automation → referral + upsell → reactivation
differentiators_to_repeat: single source of truth in CRM + attribution (UTMs, pipeline value, close rates)
repeatable onboarding + dashboards (client always sees progress)

crm_first_principles.rule_1: If it's not captured in the CRM, it didn't happen.
crm_first_principles.rule_2: Every campaign must create an asset: a tagged contact + a conversation + a pipeline stage.
crm_first_principles.rule_3: Design the pipeline before the ad: stages, qualification, objections, follow-ups, owner.
crm_first_principles.rule_4: Automate the first 80%: speed-to-lead, qualification, reminders, review requests, reactivation.
crm_first_principles.rule_5: Track revenue, not vanity: pipeline value, show rate, close rate, CAC, LTV, time-to-first-response.

agency_level: global snapshot templates per niche (real estate, clinic, tourism)

minimum_viable_automation_set: new lead: instant response + qualification questions + route to correct pipeline
appointment: confirm + reminders + reschedule + no-show recovery
lead source integrity: UTM capture + contact tagging + attribution to opportunity

website_strategy_to_capture_customers_AS.goal: Make the website a conversion machine, not a brochure.

structure.home: clear promise + niches served + proof + CTA to audit/booking
service_landing_pages: Paid Ads (only as part of CRM-enabled system)

execution_bias.ASAP_mode: Run ads to GHL landing pages first (fast iteration), then mirror best performers into WordPress for SEO compounding.
execution_bias.evergreen_mode: WordPress becomes the authority hub; GHL pages remain campaign-specific.

priority_channels: Google Search (high intent: 'CRM for clinic', 'GHL agency', 'automation for [niche]')

top_of_funnel: short video + carousel: problem/solution (speed-to-lead, WhatsApp, missed leads)
offer: free audit + quick wins checklist
mid_funnel: retargeting: proof + before/after metrics + client stories
bottom_funnel: search ads to niche landing pages

ads_to_crm_requirements: every form must create a contact + apply tags + create opportunity
every lead must get a <2 min auto-response + routing
ads_strategy_to_capture_customers_ASAP.fastest_offer_to_sell: CRM + WhatsApp speed-to-lead system for high-ticket niches (clinics/real estate), because ROI is obvious and close cycles shorten.

recommended_next_actions_ordered_by_ROI: 1) Publish 3 niche landing pages (Clinic, Real Estate, Luxury Tourism) in GHL with calendar + audit offer.
2) Turn on UTMs + pipeline + auto-response routing (GHL) so every lead becomes an opportunity.
3) Launch Meta click-to-WhatsApp + Lead Form campaigns to the 15 BR cities; retarget visitors in 7 days.
4) Launch Google Search campaigns for niche keywords to those same pages.
5) Move winning pages into WordPress for SEO compounding + build 5 case-study style articles per niche.
